prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约27059→28991→38694→44704→35963，整体呈后移趋势，2023–2024年大幅后移后2025年有所回升至约35963名，近两年波动幅度约870 0名，显示位次稳定性较弱；2021–2025年本省物理类计划数约3117→3110→3028→3015→3030人，基本稳定在3000人上下；2026年计划2875人，较2025年减少 155人（缩招约5.1%），缩招将加剧省内竞争，推高录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第120名，近年排名稳定，属于 中游211院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第95位（评价为一般），短视频平台关注度不高，对报考热度影响 有限；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类、食品科学与工程（拔尖班）等直接对应，对相 关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校以农林特色为主，相关热门专业招生规模有限；本省20 26年考生总数约167000人，按近年物理类占比约68%估算约113560人，较2025年物理类117407人减少约3847人（约3.3%），考生减少对竞争有轻微缓解作用；东北农业大学位于哈尔滨市，为本省唯一农林类211高校，2021–2025年本省招生占比约62%–67%，是本省招生绝对主力，本省考生报考 意愿较强，地域偏好因素稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约35963名、2026年计划缩招约5.1%加剧竞争、本省考生减少约3.3%略有缓解，以及声誉平稳、学校层次稳 定等因素，预计2026年物理类录取位次较2025年小幅上移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约34909名，区间34409–35409名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27059 → 28991 → 38694 → 44704 → 35963, showing an overall backward trend. After a significant backward shift in 2023–2024, it rebounded to about 35963 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 8700 in the past two years, indicating weak ranking stability. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was approximately 3117 → 3110 → 3028 → 3015 → 3030, basically stable around 3000. In 2026, the plan is 2875, a decrease of 155 (about 5.1%) compared to 2025, which will intensify provincial competition and push up admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 120th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to mid-tier 211 institutions. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 95th (rated as average), with low attention on short video platforms, having limited impact on application heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Science and Engineering (Top Talent Class), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, but the university is mainly characterized by agriculture and forestry, with limited enrollment scale for these popular majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 167,000, estimated at about 113,560 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 68%, a decrease of about 3,847 (about 3.3%) compared to 117,407 in 2025, which slightly alleviates competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, the only agriculture and forestry 211 university in the province, with provincial enrollment accounting for about 62%–67% from 2021 to 2025, making it the absolute main enrollment force in the province. Provincial examinees have strong willingness to apply, and regional preference factors are stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 35963, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 5.1% intensifying competition, the provincial examinee decrease of about 3.3% slightly alleviating, and stable reputation and university level, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will slightly move up (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 34909, ranging from 34409 to 35409.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 34409–35409, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Food Science and Engineering, Veterinary Medicine, Mechanical Engineering), use Tier 1 majors (Top Talent Classes, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Plant Production, Animal Production, Water Resources) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (below 34409), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Top Talent Classes and popular engineering majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4133 → 4718 → 7479 → 7827 → 5015, showing an overall backward trend. After a significant backward shift in 2023–2024, it rebounded noticeably to about 5015 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 2800 in the past two years, indicating moderate ranking stability. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was approximately 384 → 384 → 377 → 402 → 429, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 398, a decrease of 31 from 2025 (a contraction of about 7.2%), which will intensify competition within the province and push up admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 120th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to mid-tier 211 universities. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, which is not directly related to History Category majors and has limited appeal for liberal arts major applications. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 95th (rated as average), with low attention on short video platforms, having limited impact on application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular but with clear differentiation, while Business Administration and Finance categories show divided and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is about 167,000, with an estimated 53,440 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 32%, a decrease of about 1,267 (about 2.3%) from 54,707 in 2025, slightly alleviating competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, the only agricultural and forestry 211 university in the province, with provincial enrollment accounting for about 62%–67% from 2021 to 2025, making it the absolute main force in provincial enrollment. Provincial examinees have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference factors are stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 5015, the 2026 enrollment plan contraction of about 7.2% intensifying competition, the provincial examinee decrease of about 2.3% slightly alleviating, and factors such as stable reputation and school level, it is expected that the 2026 History Category admission ranking will slightly move upward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4828, with a range of 4328–5328.
